name: cherubscove
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; set -a; source /workspaces/cherubscove/.env 2>/dev/null || true; set +a; (command -v apk >/dev/null 2>&1 && apk add --no-cache gcompat libc6-compat) || true; curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"; export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"; echo "export BUN_INSTALL=\"$HOME/.bun\"" >> "$HOME/.bashrc"; echo "export PATH=\"$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH\"" >> "$HOME/.bashrc"; echo "set -a; source /workspaces/cherubscove/.env 2>/dev/null; set +a" >> "$HOME/.bashrc"; npm install -g supabase@latest; npm install'
